title: pycreus globosus var. nilagiricus
intro: Pycreus globosus var. nilagiricus, also known as Nilagiri sedge, is a type of grassy plant belonging to the Cyperaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pycreus globosus var. nilagiricus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pycreus globosus var. nilagiricus are typically made by drying the plant and using it in decoctions or infusions.
